pr.title: docs(flaky-tests): document monitor category sections in UI
pr.body:
## Summary
- Updates the Monitor Types section of flaky-tests/detection/index.mdx to describe the two UI categories: Health classification monitors and Lifecycle & performance monitors
- The monitors page now groups monitors into these two sections following the UI changes in trunk-io/trunk2#4010

## Source
- trunk2 PR: https://github.com/trunk-io/trunk2/pull/4010 (stack of #3991, #3992, #3993)
- Linear: TRUNK-18024

## Test plan
- [ ] Check Mintlify preview link
- [ ] Verify the Monitor Types section renders correctly with the new subsections

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
